case_title: YHB SAN FRANCISCO, LLC VS. KAISEN SUSHI, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YHB SAN FRANCISCO, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAISEN SUSHI, LLC DOES 1 TO 10 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 71 5TH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94103 (SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY), SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100163617)
